view.title: Validate persona scenario #4
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to agent update rollouts with canary testing. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or traces that confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The prior steps indicate multiple gaps in the necessary evidence for validating the entry and exit triggers, which are critical for assessing the overall scenario outcome.

gaps: No evidence for membership expiring trigger.
No evidence for form submitted trigger.
Branching logic (if opened email, do X; if not, do Y) is not evidenced.
